steps.title: Identify the year signal
steps.content: The notes state that Le Sidaner’s painting Window on the Bay of Villefranche was honored in 1925.

steps.title: Apply the year signal to the choices
steps.content: The correct answer directly incorporates the year 1925, showing exactly when Le Sidaner won the Carnegie Prize gold medal. The other choices either leave out the year or misrepresent the event. That is the correct answer.
